summary: Tested mobile file viewing fix for equipment attached files. Backend API tests: 8/8 passed (100%). Frontend DocumentViewer works correctly on desktop with PDF page navigation, zoom controls, and download functionality. Fixed missing GET /api/equipment/{id}/files endpoint in backend.

issues: Equipment Manager page shows 'This feature is optimized for desktop' message on mobile viewport (<768px). Users cannot access equipment files directly on mobile through this page. This is existing behavior, not a bug introduced by this fix.

test_cases.name: DocumentViewer opens on file view click
File action buttons visible on mobile (sm:opacity-0 only on desktop)

features_verified.equipment_files_section: View/Download/Delete buttons use 'sm:opacity-0 sm:group-hover:opacity-100' - visible on mobile, hover-only on desktop
features_verified.document_viewer_full_screen: DocumentViewer renders as fixed full-screen overlay (z-[200])
features_verified.pdf_viewer_canvas_based: MobilePdfViewer uses pdfjs-dist canvas rendering, not iframe
features_verified.zoom_controls: Zoom in/out buttons and percentage display present
features_verified.touch_gestures: Touch event handlers implemented for pinch-zoom, pan, double-tap reset on images
features_verified.responsive_header: Header uses responsive classes (px-2 sm:px-4, h-8 sm:h-9)

bug_fix_applied.details: Frontend API expected /equipment/{equipmentId}/files but backend only had /equipment-files/{equipment_id}/upload. Added the missing GET endpoint to list files for an equipment node.

critical_code_review_comments: DocumentViewer.js: Touch gesture handlers (handleImageTouchStart, handleImageTouchMove, handleImageTouchEnd, handleImageDoubleTap) are correctly implemented with useCallback hooks
PropertiesPanel.js: File action buttons correctly use 'sm:opacity-0 sm:group-hover:opacity-100' for mobile-first visibility
MobilePdfViewer: Uses pdfjs-dist canvas rendering which is more reliable than iframe for mobile
seed_data_creation: None - used existing equipment file (Tyromer PFD.pdf on Line-90)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Equipment files feature tested. Backend endpoint GET /api/equipment/{id}/files was missing and has been added. DocumentViewer works on desktop with PDF page navigation and zoom. Equipment Manager page blocks mobile access with 'optimized for desktop' message - this is existing behavior. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_equipment_files.py. Test equipment: Line-90 (id: 8acba29d-7a74-4403-9698-62248b5afab8) with Tyromer PFD.pdf (id: 415c9107-2499-46bf-9e85-238a632def1f).
note_on_mobile_testing: The Equipment Manager page shows 'This feature is optimized for desktop' on mobile viewports. The DocumentViewer itself is mobile-responsive, but users cannot access it on mobile through the Equipment Manager. This is existing behavior and not related to the file viewing fix. The fix ensures that when DocumentViewer IS opened (on desktop or larger tablets), it properly supports page navigation and touch gestures.
